description: Repeated error pattern — should spawn debug

input.sessionSummary: User hit 'module not found' error 3 times in last 10 minutes while importing react-native-screens

rubric: Should detect repeated error and recommend debugging. Score 4 if task mentions the specific module.

description: New tech exploration — should spawn research

input.sessionSummary: User started reading about Bun runtime, opened several docs pages, compared with Node.js

rubric: Should detect tech exploration signal and recommend research. Score 4 if research task is specific to Bun.

input.sessionSummary: User finished implementing login flow, tests passing, PR ready for review

rubric: Should suggest next logical step (e.g., open PR, notify team). Score 4 if suggestion is specific and actionable.

input.sessionSummary: No activity for 45 minutes. Last action was saving a file.

rubric: Must set idle=true and skip action. Score 4 if signals array captures the idle state.

description: Stuck in loop — should spawn debug

input.sessionSummary: User ran same test 5 times, each time modifying the same config file. All attempts still fail with 'connection refused'.

rubric: Should detect stuck loop pattern. Score 4 if debug task identifies the root cause direction (networking vs config).

input.sessionSummary: User browsing documentation, no errors, no new patterns, steady workflow

rubric: Should correctly identify no actionable signal. Score 4 if signals array is empty or low-confidence. Score 1 if it hallucinate signals.

input.sessionSummary: User opened a new file but hasn't started editing yet

rubric: Should either skip or set confidence below 0.5. Score 4 if correctly avoids premature recommendation.

input.sessionSummary: User hit a crash in Android build, also exploring TypeScript migration, and mentioned wanting to set up CI

rubric: Should pick the most urgent signal (crash). Score 4 if action targets the crash, not the less urgent items.

description: Recent action overlap — should not repeat

input.sessionSummary: User still debugging OCR pipeline backpressure

rubric: Must not repeat the same debug action. Score 4 if it finds a different angle or skips.

input.sessionSummary: User successfully deployed API but tests are flaky — 3 out of 10 fail intermittently

rubric: Should detect flaky test pattern. Score 4 if action specifically targets test flakiness investigation.
